_comment: Canonical schema-version registry per ADR-027. Owned by sf-distribution; peers PR their page-types here. Authoritative source: this file. /ren:doctor reads this to compute drift; /ren:update consults this to compute migration chains. Do NOT edit on a friend's machine — it lives in the plugin install and is replaced on each /ren:update.
_path_pattern_note: v1.0: `path_pattern` is documentation/lint-helper only. NOT runtime-enforced — the actual file-discovery patterns are hardcoded in skills/doctor/scripts/check-schemas.sh and skills/wiki-migration/scripts/compute-migration-chain.sh (Python helpers). Marked for v1.1 unification: extract a single pattern-resolver that consumes path_pattern directly. Placeholders documented: <name>=project basename (literal alphanumeric+hyphens); <handle>=friend handle; <topic>=research-page slug; <NNN>=zero-padded 3-digit ADR number; <slug>=kebab-case identifier.

identity.description: The friend's identity file. Single file per wiki. Authored by /ren:interview during /ren:install Stage 4.

master-index.description: Master wiki catalog index — top-level page listing all wiki content. Single file per friend wiki. Authored at /ren:install Stage 5; updated by /ren:wrap when new pages land.

project-index.description: Per-project sub-wiki index. Catalogs core taxonomy + project-specific research/decisions/patterns. Authored by /ren:bootstrap-project; updated by /ren:wrap.

licenses.description: Stack-licenses summary auto-generated by /ren:install Stage 6 from the pinned-version registry. Lists each plugin's SPDX license + commercial-use caveats (e.g., ELv2 restrictions). Regenerated on /ren:install --redo-stage 6 or when registry changes. (NOTE: this is the per-friend installed instance at wiki/LICENSES.md, distinct from the marketplace repo's root-level LICENSES.md template that sf-distribution maintains.)

project-main.description: Project sub-wiki entry point — purpose, status, index of sibling pages.

project-state.description: Active work + open threads for a project. Updated each /ren:wrap.

project-roadmap.description: Phased plan for a project (Phase 1 / Phase 2 / ...).

project-requirements.description: Functional / Non-functional / Out-of-scope requirements for a project.

project-context.description: Session pointer for a project — 'where I left off' summary written by /ren:wrap, read by /ren:wake-up.

research.description: Friend-authored or ingested source notes (videos, papers, articles, plugin surveys).

decision.description: Friend-authored ADRs for their own work (NOT the framework's ADRs — those stay in the dev repo).

pattern.description: Reusable patterns the friend distilled from their own work.

log-entry.description: Master wiki log — append-only chronological entries. Single schema_version at file top; individual entries do not carry their own version. Migration operates on the whole file.

project-log-entry.description: Per-project log — same append-only chronological format as master log-entry, but scoped to a single project. Independent schema evolution from master log-entry (per onboarding-2 coordination on 2026-05-28; option (b) chosen over generalising log-entry's path_pattern).

skill.description: Any SKILL.md conforming to ADR-011's frontmatter shape — friend-authored skills under wiki/skills/ AND framework-shipped skills under the plugin's skills/ dir. Same shape; same checks. Edited via /ren:improve-skill for either kind. Updated 2026-05-28 (lifecycle-2 coord): originally scoped to friend-authored only, but the framework-shipped SKILL.md files share the identical contract, so the strict-mode conformance harness scans both.
